assertions.assertion: Code contains AddFrontend for 'admin' with MatchingPath '/admin' and CdnIndexHtmlUrl pointing to the CDN URL
assertions.rationale: AddFrontend is a v4-specific API not in general knowledge

assertions.assertion: Code contains AddFrontend for 'portal' with MatchingPath '/portal' and CdnIndexHtmlUrl pointing to the portal CDN URL
assertions.rationale: Without skill, this v4 API is unknown

assertions.assertion: Each frontend has its own ConfigureOpenIdConnect with distinct client configuration
assertions.rationale: Without skill, the per-frontend OIDC configuration pattern is unknown

assertions.assertion: Each frontend has AddRemoteApi or equivalent remote API proxying configuration
assertions.rationale: Without skill, per-frontend remote API configuration is unknown

assertions.assertion: Uses AddBff() as the base builder
assertions.rationale: An LLM would likely know AddBff() is the starting point
